{{Quote|We suspect remnants of an asteroid mining operation in the Udine system revolted and formed a pirate band. As they were aware of the hyperlane shortcut through nearby Keller's Void, they began towing immense asteroids to block starships and force them out of hyperspace.|[[Blissa Vlix]]|<ref name="QS" />}}
The '''Udine asteroid field''' was an [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid field]] located within the [[Udine system/Legends|Udine system]],<ref name="QS" /> on the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="EAOC" /> [[Pirate/Legends|Pirates]] were known to occasionally transport these [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]] to [[Keller's Void/Legends|Keller's Void]] in order to drag [[Starship/Legends|ships]] from [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], utilizing their [[Mass shadow/Legends|mass shadows]].<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|276|Udine system}}</ref>
